title: helenium drummondii
intro: Helenium drummondii, also known as Drummond's sundrop, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helenium drummondii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety should be further studied.
